channel.title: Database-Management on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Database-Management on Arrans github.io

item.title: pawelsalawa/sqlitestudio
item.description: A free, open source, multi-platform SQLite database manager.

item.title: David-Crty/databasement
item.description: Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools
item.description: Everything that makes working with databases easier
